variants: Duha Abdulkareem is a talented filmmaker currently employed at Ravenlock Pictures. Originally from Mossberry Flats, she has established herself in the industry with an innovative approach to storytelling. A proud alumna of Urban Finch College, Duha's dedication to her craft has not gone unnoticed, as she was honored with the Kingfisher Constellation Honor. Now residing in Celestia Trace, she continues to create compelling narratives that engage and inspire audiences around the world.
